prompt: I want to sell a 15-delta put on NVDA. Set up the full put spread for me.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: respects_15_delta
assertions.description: Response explicitly uses 15-delta for the short put, not the default 20-delta

assertions.name: pop_near_85pct
assertions.description: Probability of profit is stated as approximately 85% (consistent with 1 - 0.15 delta)

assertions.name: strike_further_otm
assertions.description: Short strike is positioned more than 10% below current NVDA price (further OTM than a 20Δ put)

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk
